June 26, 2024 
IQIP Strategies 
What to know 
Immunization Quality Improvement for Providers (IQIP) promotes and supports implementation of provider-level strategies designed to help increase vaccination of children and adolescents. 
The IQIP strategies call for quality improvement activities that focus on improvements to the vaccination workflow.
